title: Optimize My Server!
description: Purely performance server modpack that decreases memory usage and keeps the server vanilla.
body:
## What is this?
It's in the name! It uses mods to optimize your Minecraft server's performance and reliability.
It also includes mods that prevent x-ray and are server-breaking.
## How do I install?
Load the modpack into a supported launcher. Copy the mods from the mod pack instance's folder and paste it into your server's mod folder. This is currently a Fabric-focused modpack.
**There is a NeoForge version in this project, but mod support is limited so it is more cutdown.**
## The Mods
1. [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) (Decreases memory usage) 2. [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) 3. [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) (Improves the Minecraft networking stack) 3. [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) [C2ME] (Improves chunk performance) 4. [NoisiumForked](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisiumforked) (Optimises worldgen performance) 5. [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric) (Improves server performance at high playercounts) 6. [Alternate Current]([https://modrinth.com/mod/alternate-current]) (Reduces the lag caused by redstone dust) 7. [CrashExploitFixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/crashexploitfixer) (A port of Papers Improve-tag-parser-handling patch, to fix a server crash exploit) 8. [AntiXray](https://modrinth.com/mod/anti-xray) (Prevents Xray) 9. [Async](https://modrinth.com/mod/async) (Improves the performance of entities by processing them in parallel threads) 10. [TT20 [TPS Fixer]](https://modrinth.com/mod/tt20) (Optimizes how ticks work when TPS is low) 11. [Worldthreader](https://modrinth.com/mod/worldthreader) (Ticks each world dimension on its own thread)
